title: celloexpress Remembering You Christmas (Snow Berries) Flower Message Cards - 60mm x 90mm - Christmas Florist Card Gift Notes (Pack of 20)
features: PACKAGE CONTAINS: Pack of 20 60mm x 90mm Christmas Message Cards in your selected design

FESTIVE AND THOUGHTFUL DESIGNS: Our flower message cards feature timeless designs perfect for adding a personal touch to flower bouquets or gifts. Ideal for the Christmas festive season to express heartfelt sentiments

PREMIUM QUALITY MATERIAL: Made from a premium cardstock with a minimum 300gsm. These cards provide a sturdy and smooth writing surface that prevents ink bleed, ensuring your messages are clear and beautifully presented

VERSITILE USE: Whether you’re attaching a note to a stunning bouquet or including a thoughtful message with a gift, these message cards are great addition for the festive period. Perfectly sized to fit snugly within a bouquet or alongside a gift making them both convenient and stylish. The compact dimensions ensure they don’t overwhelm your flowers or presents yet offer ample space for your message. The back of each card is left blank providing additional room for longer messages if required

PACK SIZES FOR YOUR CONVENIENCE: Available in packs of 10, 20, 50 and 100, our cards offer great value and flexibility for you to purchase the quantity you require. Ideal for both personal use and professional florists
description: celloexpress Remembering You Christmas (Snow Berries) Flower Message Cards - 60mm x 90mm - Christmas Florist Card Gift Notes (Pack of 20)
